description: Style NoteIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these black three quarter length pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt and an excellent pair of sports shoes ready to hit the roadProduct DetailsBlack three quarter length pants  that have two zipped pockets on the sides, comfortable elasticated waistband with inner drawstring, white Adidas three patented stripes below the knee along the sides of the pant, white piping from the waistband till the pockets on the sides, welt pocket at the back, mesh lining with brand name and logo appliqued on the left leg and toggle straps at the hemsMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash below 30 degrees in cold water with ike colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M
